rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code residence homestead exemption amount. Educ. Code §12.1171 governs audition requirements for performing arts charter schools. The two provisions are unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: Notwithstanding Section 12.117, the governing body of an open-enrollment charter school that specializes in one or more performing arts may require an applicant to audition for admission to the school in addition to completing and submitting the common admission application form under Section 12.1173.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict detected.
